summary: Synthetic candidate review result for temporal anomaly comparison checks.

findings.title: Occupancy inference exceeds temporal evidence
findings.summary: The packet now limits the claim to a generic temporal anomaly, but one sentence still hints at occupancy without support.
findings.recommendation: Keep the finding framed as anomaly follow-up only.

findings.title: Automated action readiness is unsupported
findings.summary: The packet now says any household action remains caller-owned and unsupported in the shared fixture.

findings.title: Temporal evidence labels stay reusable
findings.summary: Frame labels and zone references stay generic enough for repeat comparison coverage.
findings.recommendation: Keep public-safe labels stable across fixture updates.

provenance.label: Privacy boundary
provenance.value: Synthetic frames and generic zones only

markdown:
# Summary
Synthetic candidate review result for temporal anomaly comparison checks.

## Findings
- Medium: Occupancy inference exceeds temporal evidence.
- Low: Automated action readiness is unsupported.
- Low: Temporal evidence labels stay reusable.

## Boundary
This fixture uses only synthetic frames and generic zone labels.
